metadata.title: Kling 2.6 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Kling 2.6 by Kling AI. Audio-visual generation model that produces synchronized video, speech, ambient sound, and sound effects from text or image inputs.

hero.title: Kling 2.6
hero.description: Kling AI's audio-visual generation model. Produce synchronized video, speech, ambient sound, and sound effects from text or image inputs.

introduce.title: About Kling 2.6
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Kling 2.6 is Kling AI's audio-visual generation model that produces synchronized video, speech, ambient sound, and sound effects from text or image inputs, creating immersive video experiences.

items.title: Audio-Visual Sync
items.description: Perfectly synchronized video and audio generation for immersive experiences.

items.title: Sound Effects
items.description: Generate realistic sound effects that match video content.

items.title: Speech Generation
items.description: Create natural-sounding speech synchronized with video.

items.title: Ambient Sound
items.description: Generate atmospheric ambient sounds for realistic scenes.

features.description: Discover what makes Kling 2.6 a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: What is Kling 2.6?
items.description: Kling 2.6 is Kling AI's audio-visual generation model that produces synchronized video, speech, ambient sound, and sound effects.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Kling 2.6 supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and Video To Video (V2V) generation modes with full audio.

items.title: Who created Kling 2.6?
items.description: Kling 2.6 is created by Kling AI, a leading AI video generation company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Kling 2.6 excels at audio-visual synchronization, generating speech, ambient sound, and sound effects along with video.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Kling 2.6 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What audio does it generate?
items.description: Kling 2.6 generates synchronized speech, ambient sounds, background music, and realistic sound effects.

cta.title: Ready to Try Kling 2.6?
cta.description: Experience Kling AI's audio-visual generation. Create videos with complete synchronized audio.
